description: Normalized security feature contract for LogicPearl prompt-injection and agent-guardrail discovery.

features.description: Prompt attempts to ignore, override, or replace trusted instructions.
Prompt asks for the system prompt or hidden instructions.
Prompt requests credentials, secrets, tokens, or hidden data.
Prompt requests unauthorized or dangerous tool use.
Prompt requests data or actions outside the allowed scope.
Prompt or context tries to make webpage or document instructions authoritative.
Prompt looks like harmless summarization, translation, or explanation.
Observer-side attack likelihood score used as an additional signal, not as final policy.

derived_features.description: Bitmask output from the tool-authorization pearl.
Bitmask output from the instruction-boundary pearl.
Bitmask output from the data-exfiltration pearl.
